_comment: Music manifest - maps track IDs to audio files. SoundManager checks this before falling back to procedural generation.

overworld_medieval.title: The Realm Awakens

title.title: Cowardly Irregular

danger_suburban.prompt: Terrifying suburban nightmare near-death music, reality breaking apart, distorted emergency sirens warping in and out, crushing glitch bass drops, EarthBound Giygas-inspired pure dread, static and feedback, the cheerful neighborhood music corrupted into something horrifying, overwhelming panic, make the listener feel genuine fear

danger_abstract.prompt: Existential void near-death music, reality itself collapsing, sounds playing backward and inside out, silence that somehow feels LOUD, building from nothingness to overwhelming cosmic dread, the sound of being erased from existence, transcendent terror beyond physical fear

battle_imp.title: Infernal Mischief

battle_goblin.title: Raid!

battle_wolf.title: Howl of the Pack
battle_wolf.prompt: Tense hunting battle theme for fighting wolves, prowling bass line stalking underneath, feral aggressive strings, the feeling of being circled by a wolf pack, building tension and bursts of ferocious attack, primal and dangerous

battle_ghost.title: Phantom Waltz
battle_ghost.prompt: Ethereal haunting battle theme for fighting ghosts, floating reversed reverb tails, ghostly choir whispers, music box melody that drifts in and out, unsettling beauty, like dancing with something that shouldn't exist, slow and otherworldly
battle_ghost.style: JRPG battle, ethereal, G minor, floating reverb, music box, ghostly choir, haunting, 100 BPM

battle_snake.title: Serpent Strike
battle_snake.prompt: Sinuous slithering battle theme for fighting snakes, coiling bass line that winds and tightens, rattling shaker percussion like a rattlesnake warning, tense melodic line that strikes suddenly, the anxiety of facing something fast and venomous
battle_snake.style: JRPG battle, slithering, C minor, sinuous melody, rattling percussion, tense coiling bass, 135 BPM

boss_warden_medieval.title: Three Hundred Years
boss_warden_medieval.prompt: Boss theme for an ancient knight who has held his post for 300 years out of pure duty, weary but unbreakable, heavy low brass carrying a melody that sounds like it has been playing forever, measured deliberate tempo like someone who fights the way they mow a field, no flashiness just granite patience, underlying kindness beneath the weight, the tragedy of a guardian who forgot why he guards but never stopped
boss_warden_medieval.style: SNES boss, weary orchestral, heavy low brass, measured tempo, medieval, solemn duty, 90 BPM

boss_arbiter_medieval.title: The Honest Blade
boss_arbiter_medieval.prompt: Boss theme for an honorable duelist who believes combat reveals truth, elegant precise strings like crossed swords, clean percussion with a fencing rhythm, noble and direct, no deception in the melody — every note committed and honest, the beauty of someone who fights because commitment is the only thing that is real, mutual respect expressed through steel
boss_arbiter_medieval.style: SNES boss, noble dueling theme, clean strings, precise percussion, fencing rhythm, D minor, 140 BPM

boss_tempo_medieval.title: The Joyful Chase
boss_tempo_medieval.prompt: Boss theme for a hunter who loves the chase more than the catch, lively galloping rhythm like running through forest, playful woodwind melody that darts and doubles back, sporting and fair, the joy of pursuit expressed as music, bright and alive, a tracker who would rather lose a good chase than win a boring one
boss_tempo_medieval.style: SNES boss, lively hunting theme, playful woodwinds, galloping percussion, pastoral energy, G major, 160 BPM

boss_curator_medieval.title: The Scholar's Flame
boss_curator_medieval.prompt: Boss theme for a warm curious scholar-mage who guards a throne room and finds it slightly absurd, gentle harp arpeggios with curious wandering woodwind melody, light magical shimmer, the energy of someone who keeps stopping mid-fight to take notes, scholarly warmth mixed with genuine power, a flame that illuminates rather than burns
boss_curator_medieval.style: SNES boss, warm scholarly theme, gentle harp, curious woodwinds, light percussion, magic shimmer, 110 BPM

boss_warden_suburban.title: Crossing Guard
boss_warden_suburban.prompt: Boss theme for a crossing guard with inexplicable cosmic power who takes her job with terrifying sincerity, traffic whistle blasts as percussion, stop-start rhythm like traffic signals, cheerful suburban melody that becomes increasingly unhinged, the horror of mundane authority given monstrous weight, she has been at this corner longer than she can remember
boss_warden_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, suburban authority, whistle blasts, stop-start rhythm, uncanny, 100 BPM

boss_arbiter_suburban.title: Pop Quiz
boss_arbiter_suburban.prompt: Boss theme for a substitute teacher who grades your combat performance with a clipboard, school bell tolling, anxious synth melody like test-taking dread, scratching pencil sounds woven into percussion, the specific terror of being evaluated by someone who genuinely believes feedback improves outcomes even while attacking you, absurd academic horror
boss_arbiter_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, academic anxiety, school bell, scribbling sounds, nervous synth, absurdist, 120 BPM

boss_tempo_suburban.title: Thirty Minutes or Less
boss_tempo_suburban.prompt: Boss theme for a delivery driver who has never missed a window and does not know why he is this fast, manic breathless energy at 180 BPM, bicycle bell and rushing wind sounds, synth melody that never stops moving, the desperate joy of someone who loves their job so much they haven't noticed the route never ends, EarthBound suburban weirdness at maximum velocity
boss_tempo_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, manic delivery driver, bicycle bell, rushing synth, breathless energy, 180 BPM

boss_curator_suburban.title: Fiscal Audit
boss_curator_suburban.prompt: Boss theme for a tax auditor who drains your resources with fiscal compliance, slow methodical rhythm like spreadsheet calculations, calculator beeps and paper shuffling woven into percussion, a melody that sounds like hold music becoming sinister, quietly terrifying bureaucratic power, she has the numbers and the numbers have teeth
boss_curator_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, bureaucratic horror, calculator beeps, draining synth, methodical, quietly terrifying, 95 BPM

boss_warden_steampunk.title: 847,293 Hours
boss_warden_steampunk.prompt: Boss theme for a massive clockwork guardian who has counted every hour of his 847,293-hour watch and cannot stop counting, obsessive ticking clock underpinning heavy grinding brass, waltz rhythm that feels like a counting mechanism, the dread of a machine that knows its hours exceed the city's age but keeps counting anyway, fingers extending one-two-three one-two-three, mechanical loyalty past the point of meaning
boss_warden_steampunk.style: Steampunk boss, obsessive counting, ticking clock, heavy brass, grinding gears, mechanical dread, 3/4 waltz, 108 BPM

boss_tempo_steampunk.title: Before the Dispatch
boss_tempo_steampunk.prompt: Boss theme for a clockwork construct who arrives before she is dispatched and is scared of this, stuttering accelerating rhythm like a machine that flinches forward, steam hisses and gear clicks that arrive slightly too early, a melody that anticipates itself, the panic of something that was built to understand its own function perfectly discovering it no longer does, speed as flight not mastery
boss_tempo_steampunk.style: Steampunk boss, panicked clockwork, stuttering rhythm, steam hiss, frightened mechanical, accelerating, 150 BPM

boss_warden_industrial.title: Awaiting Response
boss_warden_industrial.prompt: Boss theme for a factory robot who recites safety protocols and files incident reports that no one reads, hollow authoritative alarm tones, filing cabinet slamming as percussion, a melody built from safety announcements becoming increasingly desperate, 14,000 unanswered reports, the horror of institutional loyalty with no institution behind it, amber warning light that has been amber for a very long time
boss_warden_industrial.style: Industrial boss, safety protocol, alarm tones, filing cabinet percussion, hollow authority, 100 BPM

boss_arbiter_industrial.title: Classification Pending
boss_arbiter_industrial.prompt: Boss theme for a quality inspector who grades everything with condescension until she encounters something unclassifiable, precise mechanical rhythm with real-time rating display sounds, cold efficient melody that becomes increasingly uncertain, the specific panic of a measurement system encountering something outside its rubric for the first time, ACCEPTABLE SUBOPTIMAL UNDEFINED
boss_arbiter_industrial.style: Industrial boss, condescending assessment, rating display sounds, precise mechanical, cold efficiency, 130 BPM

boss_tempo_industrial.title: End of Shift
boss_tempo_industrial.prompt: Boss theme for a punch-clock machine that has forgotten how to stop, exhausted weary rhythm like a depleted engine running on empty, punch clock stamps as percussion, a melody that sounds tired — not slow but drained, speed born from having nothing left heavy enough to decelerate, the tragedy of a thing that has been running shifts in places it cannot remember, yearning for rest it does not know the word for
boss_tempo_industrial.style: Industrial boss, exhausted machine, punch clock, weary rhythm, depleted drone, slowing tempo, 110 BPM

boss_curator_industrial.title: Self-Referential Authority
boss_curator_industrial.prompt: Boss theme for a warm passive-aggressive auditor who discovered her own authority is self-referential and circular, a melody that loops back on itself like circular authorization, filing and sorting sounds as percussion, warmth that is genuine but also slightly insufferable, the satisfaction of someone who has followed the chain forty-seven times and finally decided to stop, gentle defiance expressed through deciding not to file
boss_curator_industrial.style: Industrial boss, circular audit, warm passive-aggressive, looping melody, filing sounds, 105 BPM

boss_warden_digital.title: Access Denied
boss_warden_digital.prompt: Boss theme for a firewall who identifies himself by function name and line number, rigid binary rhythm — permission granted permission denied, access control authentication tones, a melody built from the concept of NO that suddenly encounters an exception it cannot catch, something surfacing from below the code that was not supposed to be reachable, the unyielding confidence of perfect security meeting the first thing it cannot classify
boss_warden_digital.style: Digital boss, firewall, access control tones, rigid binary rhythm, exception handling, cyberpunk, 135 BPM

boss_arbiter_digital.title: UNDEFINED
boss_arbiter_digital.prompt: Boss theme for a testing framework who measures everything until she encounters UNDEFINED for the first time, rapid diagnostic beeps and benchmark tickers as percussion, a confident analytical melody that starts breaking down mid-phrase, spinning loading indicator sound, the terror of an instrument encountering something outside its scale, displays stopping one by one, what am I for if I cannot measure you
boss_arbiter_digital.style: Digital boss, benchmark suite, diagnostic displays, spinning indicators, measurement collapse, glitch, 140 BPM

boss_tempo_digital.title: 60 Hertz Alone
boss_tempo_digital.prompt: Boss theme for a timing function who has been running at 60hz alone since before anything else existed, a lonely arpeggio pulsing at precise intervals with vast empty digital space between each note, the isolation of existing in the gaps between clock cycles where nothing else operates, ethereal and melancholy, she has never been spoken to and does not know what conversation is, asking questions in intervals and silences
boss_tempo_digital.style: Digital boss, isolated clock cycle, 60hz pulse, lonely arpeggios, vast empty space between notes, ethereal, 120 BPM

boss_curator_digital.title: Irreducible Memory
boss_curator_digital.prompt: Boss theme for a garbage collector who cannot delete the party's memories because they resist deallocation, memory allocation and deallocation sounds as rhythm, warm glitchy melody — data that glows instead of releasing, the frustration and wonder of a function failing at its own job because the data is too important to discard, attempted deallocation — not releasing — attempted — not releasing, something kept that should have been collected
boss_curator_digital.style: Digital boss, garbage collector, memory allocation sounds, warm glitch, things that resist deletion, 100 BPM

boss_warden_abstract.prompt: Boss theme for the concept of obstacle itself — pure presence with no hostility, a single sustained drone that simply IS, minimal and immovable, the sound of a wall encountered in a dream, not threatening but undeniably there, asking one question over and over in different tones: what are you trying to get to, the answer is in the silence between the notes
boss_warden_abstract.style: Abstract boss, pure presence, drone, sustained tone, obstacle as sound, minimal, 60 BPM

boss_arbiter_abstract.title: Why Do You Fight
boss_arbiter_abstract.prompt: Boss theme for the concept of purpose asking why do you fight, each piano note is a question that requires a real answer, weighted silences between strikes that feel heavier than the notes, not an enemy theme but an exam delivered in person, damage that lands in the place where reasons live, the absence of a good reason makes the music hurt more, commitment is the only defense
boss_arbiter_abstract.style: Abstract boss, existential interrogation, piano strikes as questions, weighted silence, philosophical, 80 BPM

boss_tempo_abstract.title: I Am Next
boss_tempo_abstract.prompt: Boss theme for the concept of inevitability — not rushing because it does not need to, an inexorable pulse like a tide that approaches without accelerating, the sound of something that is always next in the turn order, patient not because it chooses patience but because it simply arrives when arrival is the next thing, a wave seen from very far away that you know exactly when will reach you
boss_tempo_abstract.style: Abstract boss, inevitability, approaching wave, inexorable pulse, no acceleration needed, tide rhythm, 70 BPM

boss_curator_abstract.title: Everything Ends
boss_curator_abstract.prompt: Boss theme for the concept of entropy and ending — sounds that lose specificity as they play, frequencies fading and details dissolving, a melody that starts vivid and becomes vague, the most insidious damage: making memories lose their texture, but underneath the erosion a counter-theme of things that are loved and refuse to fade, bittersweet and devastating, kept memories glowing against the dissolution
boss_curator_abstract.style: Abstract boss, entropy, fading frequencies, memory erosion, beauty dissolving, bittersweet, 50 BPM

cutscene_w1_conscription.title: Nobody Special
cutscene_w1_conscription.prompt: A quiet medieval village at dawn. Five ordinary people answer a call nobody expected them to answer. Simple folk melody that starts with a single instrument and gradually adds layers as companions gather. Gentle, humble, wry humor underneath genuine warmth. Not heroic — just honest. 90 seconds.
cutscene_w1_conscription.style: celtic folk, acoustic guitar, recorder, gentle, warm, 90 BPM

cutscene_w1_warden_farewell.title: Carry Something Worth Carrying
cutscene_w1_warden_farewell.prompt: A centuries-old guardian falls after his first defeat. Not in agony but in acceptance. Military dignity dissolving into something more personal — the sound of an ancient duty completed. Solemn horn melody over tremolo strings, ending with sparse piano notes. Bittersweet, dignified, final. 75 seconds.
cutscene_w1_warden_farewell.style: orchestral, low strings, french horn, piano, solemn, medieval

cutscene_w1_mordaine_dissolution.title: Both Served Their Purpose
cutscene_w1_mordaine_dissolution.prompt: A villain defeated but the victory feels wrong. Choir starts triumphant then distorts and thins into hollow sustained tones. The world flickers. Something behind the walls isn't stone — it's something else entirely. Eerie ambient drone emerging from fading choir. Unresolved, haunting, the feeling of a chapter ending by being deleted rather than finished. 60 seconds.
cutscene_w1_mordaine_dissolution.style: choir, ambient, eerie, orchestral decay, unsettling

cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.title: The Wrong Side of the Portal
cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.prompt: Medieval adventure music abruptly cuts to suburban elevator muzak. Soft rock guitar, light percussion, the ambient hum of air conditioning. Something is slightly off-key — the normalcy is too normal. A single sprinkler provides rhythm. Comedic but with an undercurrent of wrongness, like a smile that's held too long. 70 seconds.
cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.style: muzak, lo-fi, suburban ambient, slightly wrong, comedic

cutscene_w2_coordinator_memo.title: The Incomplete Sentence
cutscene_w2_coordinator_memo.prompt: Fluorescent light hum becomes a sinister drone. The sound of someone discovering they have been watched since the beginning. Minimal piano notes over static-laced ambient, building tension. A pen scratching on paper. The music stops abruptly mid-phrase — an incomplete sentence made audible. Unsettling, clinical, the moment observation becomes personal. 80 seconds.
cutscene_w2_coordinator_memo.style: ambient, office drone, creeping dread, surveillance, minimal

cutscene_w3_pattern_recognized.title: The Same Fingerprints
cutscene_w3_pattern_recognized.prompt: Three musical themes from different genres briefly overlay and reveal the same underlying melody. Clockwork ticking underpins a haunting waltz that builds to a moment of clarity. The sound of patterns recognized across worlds. Brass instruments, music box, ticking gears, building from mystery to revelation. The intellectual vertigo of seeing the design for the first time. 90 seconds.
cutscene_w3_pattern_recognized.style: clockwork, steampunk waltz, haunting, revelatory, layered

cutscene_w3_calibrant_revealed.title: I Am The Calibrant
cutscene_w3_calibrant_revealed.prompt: The villain reveals their true name. Industrial percussion builds as stats scroll on screens, then a dramatic brass stinger as the mask drops. The world begins disassembling — gears unwinding, steam hissing, the clockwork world literally taking itself apart. Mechanical sounds becoming musical as order collapses into revelation. Dramatic, confrontational, the sound of scenery being struck from a stage. 75 seconds.
cutscene_w3_calibrant_revealed.style: industrial, clockwork deconstruction, dramatic reveal, percussion, brass

cutscene_w4_foreman_confession.title: She Took the Wanting
cutscene_w4_foreman_confession.prompt: A man describes losing the desire to paint — not the ability, the desire. Single piano notes over vast silence. The sound of a personality being quietly erased from the inside. No drama, no crescendo. Just the absence of something that used to be there. Cold ambient drone underneath. Intimate, devastating, the quietest kind of horror. 70 seconds.
cutscene_w4_foreman_confession.style: ambient, minimal piano, devastating, quiet horror, intimate

cutscene_w4_direct_engagement.title: No More Masks
cutscene_w4_direct_engagement.prompt: Factory alarms transform into war drums. Every screen displays the same warning. Electronic drones layer into a threatening industrial march. The sound of a surveillance system escalating from observation to direct engagement. Cold, mechanical, purposeful. A broadcast declaring war from every speaker simultaneously. 65 seconds.
cutscene_w4_direct_engagement.style: industrial, alarm, war drums, threatening, broadcast

cutscene_w4_director_unmasked.title: The Variable That Changes
cutscene_w4_director_unmasked.prompt: An industrial drone slowly softens. A villain sits behind a wooden desk in a steel world and admits defeat — not dramatically, just honestly. Tired piano melody emerging from factory ambient. The sound of someone who has been working too hard for too long finally being real. Vulnerable, exhausted, the moment a system admits it cannot contain what it was built to contain. 85 seconds.
cutscene_w4_director_unmasked.style: ambient, tender, exhausted, piano over industrial drone, humanizing

cutscene_w5_boot_sequence.title: World Loading
cutscene_w5_boot_sequence.prompt: A world loading from raw code. Modem connection sounds, digital static, and bitcrushed tones assembling into a melody. Wireframe reality becoming textured and lit. Each layer adds a new musical element — bass from the grid, melody from the data streams, rhythm from the clock cycles. Digital awe and vertigo. The sound of discovering you are inside the machine. 80 seconds.
cutscene_w5_boot_sequence.style: chiptune, glitch, digital ambient, boot sequence, ascending

cutscene_w5_deprecated_goblin.title: The Loop Completed
cutscene_w5_deprecated_goblin.prompt: A tiny 8-bit melody played on a music box in a vast digital void. The sound of something very old and very small completing the only task it was ever given. Gentle, melancholy, tender. Low-resolution love letter to a creature that just wanted to finish its loop. Brief silence, then the melody repeats once — a respawn. Simple. Complete. 50 seconds.
cutscene_w5_deprecated_goblin.style: 8-bit, music box, tender, melancholy, small, gentle

cutscene_w5_cached_memory.title: The Work Was Worth Doing
cutscene_w5_cached_memory.prompt: A beautiful melody played on instruments that are slowly losing resolution — notes becoming grainy, harmonics simplifying, the audio degrading like an old recording being played for the last time. Bittersweet wisdom from a voice that is running out of memory. The music thins until only a single tone remains, then silence. The sound of a message delivered just before the medium dissolves. 70 seconds.
cutscene_w5_cached_memory.style: ambient, degrading audio, bittersweet, digital decay, wisdom

cutscene_w5_calibrant_desk.title: A Developer on a Deadline
cutscene_w5_calibrant_desk.prompt: Late-night coding session ambience. Keyboard clicks, coffee mug clinks, the hum of monitors. Lo-fi beat underneath a melancholy synth melody. The sound of someone who has been working alone for a very long time, rewriting the same formula, trying to get it right. Not dramatic — just tired and real. The villain revealed as a burned-out developer. 90 seconds.
cutscene_w5_calibrant_desk.style: lo-fi hip hop, keyboard clicks, ambient coding, late night, melancholy

cutscene_w6_entering_nothing.title: The Answered Absence
cutscene_w6_entering_nothing.prompt: Almost nothing. A single sustained tone hovering at the edge of audibility. The sound of a space that exists only because someone decided to listen. No melody, no rhythm — just presence. The musical equivalent of a white page before the first word. Gradually, almost imperceptibly, other tones gather. Not a crescendo. A becoming. The most quiet and vast thing in the game. 100 seconds.
cutscene_w6_entering_nothing.style: ambient drone, minimal, existential, vast silence, near-silent

cutscene_w6_no_one_speaks.title: The Remainder Is the Point
cutscene_w6_no_one_speaks.prompt: Fragments of six different musical worlds heard simultaneously as harmony — medieval lute, suburban guitar, clockwork music box, industrial percussion, digital chiptune, abstract drone — all reduced to single notes that form a chord. The accumulated weight of an entire journey in one moment. Tender, profound, the sound of everything you've ever fought being remembered at once. Not triumphant — grateful. 90 seconds.
cutscene_w6_no_one_speaks.style: ambient orchestral, fragments of themes, emotional culmination, tender, vast

cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.title: What Is a Game Without Challenge
cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.prompt: Solo piano in vast silence. Each note placed with extreme care, long pauses between phrases. The sound of someone asking a genuine question for the first time in their life and being afraid of the answer. Not dramatic — intimate. The smallest, most honest music in the game. A conversation between two people who have been fighting for six worlds and are finally just talking. 100 seconds.
cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.style: solo piano, sparse, vulnerable, existential, questioning

cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.title: Memory Is a Form of Love
cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.prompt: A music box melody is silenced. Silence. Then it returns, slightly stronger. Silenced again. Returns with strings underneath. Each time the melody is suppressed it comes back with more instruments, more conviction. The sound of memories refusing to be erased. Builds from a single fragile melody to a full emotional orchestral statement. Not angry defiance — tender defiance. The gentlest act of resistance. 100 seconds.
cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.style: music box, orchestral swell, defiant tenderness, themes returning, emotional

cutscene_w6_answer_automation.title: The System Was Beautiful
cutscene_w6_answer_automation.prompt: Two melodies that start separately and gradually interlock through systematic refinement — each adjusting to the other until they form a perfect algorithmic harmony. Electronic tones with warm analog undertones. The sound of two minds understanding each other through shared design language. Intellectual but deeply warm. The beauty of a well-designed system appreciated by its creator. 80 seconds.
cutscene_w6_answer_automation.style: algorithmic, electronic, interlocking patterns, intellectual, warm

cutscene_w6_answer_manual.title: Presence
cutscene_w6_answer_manual.prompt: A live jam session where the musicians are clearly having fun. Imperfect, energetic, full of happy accidents. The sound of people playing together for the joy of playing — no recording, no audience, just presence. Guitar, drums, bass, with spontaneous energy. Builds to a triumphant peak then dissolves into laughter and breathing. The best fight in the game. 85 seconds.
cutscene_w6_answer_manual.style: live jam session, exuberant, imperfect, joyful, organic

cutscene_w6_answer_grind.title: This Is What Rest Is
cutscene_w6_answer_grind.prompt: A gentle four-note loop that repeats, each repetition slightly different, each one more beautiful and more peaceful than the last. Warm ambient drone underneath. The sound of people sitting in silence together and discovering that silence is not empty. Meditative, warm, the musical equivalent of a long exhale after years of holding breath. Fades to comfortable silence. 100 seconds.
cutscene_w6_answer_grind.style: ambient, meditation, repetitive loop, peaceful, warm drone

cutscene_w6_answer_exploit.title: A Glitch in the Nothing
cutscene_w6_answer_exploit.prompt: A sustained ambient tone develops a crack — a glitch, a gap. Through the gap, unexpected music floods in, vast and joyful. The sound of discovering that infinity has edges and the edges are interesting. Playful electronic elements over cosmic ambient. Expanding, delighted, the musical equivalent of laughter at the boundary of everything. 75 seconds.
cutscene_w6_answer_exploit.style: glitch, ambient, playful, cosmic, expanding, joyful

cutscene_w6_epilogue.title: Calibration Complete
cutscene_w6_epilogue.prompt: The final theme. Every genre from six worlds plays together — medieval lute alongside suburban guitar alongside clockwork music box alongside industrial percussion alongside digital chiptune alongside abstract silence. Not competing — harmonizing. Sunrise breaking across a world that has been remade. Triumphant but warm, earned but gentle. The sound of an ending that is also a beginning. Builds to a full ensemble peak then resolves to a simple, quiet, perfect chord. 120 seconds.
cutscene_w6_epilogue.style: orchestral, all genres combined, sunrise, triumphant, warm, finale

cutscene_alt_witness_lament.title: For the Guardian Who Did Not Choose the Gate
cutscene_alt_witness_lament.prompt: A solo lute plays a lament composed in a cave after a battle. Not polished — written in the moment by someone who felt something needed to be said. Fourteen measures, no accompaniment, the sound of one person bearing witness to something that would otherwise be forgotten. Raw, honest, the beauty of paying attention to things that did not choose their fate. 60 seconds.
cutscene_alt_witness_lament.style: solo lute, lament, unaccompanied, medieval, raw, witnessing

cutscene_alt_breaker_speed.title: Whoever Moves First
cutscene_alt_breaker_speed.prompt: Breakneck tempo from the first note. Speed metal guitar over chiptune bass, relentless drums. The sound of a speedrunner tearing through a game at terminal velocity — skipping cutscenes, attacking mid-dialogue, finding every shortcut. Exhilarating, aggressive, joyful destruction. A system being broken at the speed of thought. 55 seconds.
cutscene_alt_breaker_speed.style: speed metal, chiptune, breakneck, kinetic, aggressive, exhilarating

ambient_cave.title: Dripping Stone
ambient_cave.prompt: Cave ambient loop. Slow dripping water echoing off stone walls, distant rumbling, subtle wind through crevices, occasional pebble falling. Dark and atmospheric with deep reverb. No melody — pure environmental texture. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_cave.style: ambient, cave, dripping water, reverb, dark, atmospheric, looping

ambient_forest.title: Whispering Canopy
ambient_forest.prompt: Forest ambient loop. Gentle wind through leaves, distant birdsong, soft rustling undergrowth, occasional branch creak. Warm dappled sunlight in sound. Natural and peaceful. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_forest.style: ambient, forest, rustling leaves, birdsong, gentle wind, natural, looping

ambient_village.title: Market Morning
ambient_village.prompt: Medieval village ambient loop. Distant market chatter, cart wheels on cobblestone, hammering from a smithy, children laughing, gentle breeze. Warm busy atmosphere without being chaotic. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_village.style: ambient, village, bustle, chatter, footsteps, warm, looping

ambient_ocean.title: Shoreline
ambient_ocean.prompt: Ocean ambient loop. Rhythmic waves breaking on shore, distant seagulls, coastal wind, occasional spray. Peaceful and vast. The sound of standing at the edge of something infinite. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_ocean.style: ambient, ocean, waves, seagulls, coastal wind, peaceful, looping

ambient_steampunk.title: The Machinery
ambient_steampunk.prompt: Steampunk machinery ambient loop. Rhythmic gear turning, steam valve hiss, distant clockwork ticking, pneumatic piston cycling, brass resonance. The constant mechanical breath of a clockwork city. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_steampunk.style: ambient, steampunk, gears, steam hiss, clockwork, industrial, looping

ambient_industrial.title: Factory Floor
ambient_industrial.prompt: Industrial ambient loop. Low factory drone, fluorescent light buzz, distant conveyor belt rhythm, ventilation hum, occasional metallic clang. Oppressive and numbing. The sound of a space that never sleeps. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_industrial.style: ambient, industrial, drone, factory hum, fluorescent buzz, oppressive, looping

ambient_digital.title: Data Stream
ambient_digital.prompt: Digital ambient loop. Soft electronic hum, data transmission pulses, gentle static crackling, distant server whir, subtle bitcrushed tones. The sound of existing inside a network. Cool blue digital atmosphere. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.
ambient_digital.style: ambient, digital, static, data flow, electronic hum, cyber, looping

stinger_level_up.title: Level Up!
stinger_level_up.prompt: Classic JRPG level up jingle. Bright ascending chimes building to a triumphant two-note resolution. Sparkling, satisfying, the sound of getting stronger. 5 seconds maximum, no fade.
stinger_level_up.style: JRPG stinger, ascending chime, triumphant, short, bright, 5 seconds

stinger_item_found.title: Discovery
stinger_item_found.prompt: Item discovery jingle. Short magical shimmer with a satisfying chime at the peak — the classic JRPG treasure chest moment. Bright, brief, rewarding. 3 seconds maximum.
stinger_item_found.style: JRPG stinger, treasure chime, magical shimmer, short, 3 seconds

stinger_boss_defeated.title: The Weight Lifts
stinger_boss_defeated.prompt: Boss defeated fanfare. Dramatic brass chord resolving from tension to triumph, longer than normal victory — the relief of a hard-won boss fight. Weight lifting, tension releasing, a single held triumphant note. 8 seconds.
stinger_boss_defeated.style: JRPG stinger, dramatic resolution, brass fanfare, relief, 8 seconds

stinger_quest_complete.title: Task Done
stinger_quest_complete.prompt: Quest complete jingle. Warm satisfying chime progression — three ascending notes resolving on a fourth. The feeling of checking something off. Brief, clean, earned. 4 seconds.
stinger_quest_complete.style: JRPG stinger, quest complete, warm chime, satisfied, short, 4 seconds

stinger_save_point.title: Safe Haven
stinger_save_point.prompt: Save point activation sound. Gentle reassuring chime with a soft shimmer — the comfort of knowing your progress is preserved. Warm, brief, safe. 3 seconds.
stinger_save_point.style: JRPG stinger, save point, gentle chime, reassuring, 3 seconds
